Home/Region

Understand the Region

Regional growth means crossing county lines on purpose.

Use the tri-county guide to route attention between Raton/Colfax, Trinidad/Las Animas, Walsenburg-La Veta/Huerfano, and statewide support systems.

Mobile quick route

Choose a county

Jump to the county or regional page that matches the place you are trying to reach.

ColfaxLas AnimasHuerfanoRegional channels

Co-channeling model

One public resource, many local doors.

County pages make local entry easy. The Network page keeps cross-county directories, media, funding, creative-economy, and nonprofit resources connected.

  • Colfax: Raton city, chamber, MainStreet, GrowRaton, Explore Raton, KRTN, NM statewide support.
  • Las Animas: Colexico/TLAC, Trinidad tourism, CREATE Trinidad, city economic development, Chronicle-News.
  • Huerfano: chamber, HCED, Spanish Peaks Country, La Veta, World Journal, Wheelhouse, creative district.

Inventory coverage

The data is strongest for visibility, media, resources, and funding paths.

These counts describe the guide's current source coverage. Do not treat them as audience size, market demand, economic value, or verified reach.

  • 120Promotion
  • 97Media
  • 90Resource
  • 68Maker / Artist Vendor
  • 55Business / Partner
  • 52Funding
  • 42Creative / Artist
  • 22Training
  • 10Bulletin / Notice

Best regional uses

What this guide helps people do.

Launch or relaunch

Get business counseling, make a listing, pick a first audience, and send one clean announcement through three local channels.

Promote an event

Check calendars, avoid conflicts, submit to tourism and media channels, and ask one chamber/creative district/partner to share.

Find partners

Use chambers, nonprofit directories, arts councils, public libraries, schools, and local service organizations as referral nodes.

Expand customers

Use visitor-facing directories, media, business associations, county-specific pages, and cross-county offers to reach beyond one town.

Next action

  • Open the Colfax county starting point
  • Open the Las Animas county starting point

Immediate directory

Find the right route.

Search by need, county, town, audience, or task. Results include practical links and update reminders so users can act without treating old details as final.

Results update after submitting the form or after a short pause while typing. Press Escape to close this panel.

Colfax NM + Las Animas CO + Huerfano CO

This guide helps businesses, artists, nonprofits, programs, venues, and service providers find the right regional route faster.

See something outdated? Send a source link through Submit Update so the guide can improve.
